perturbation.original_text:
Fee Due Dates
$75,000 - Sponsorship Fee
$50,000 due upon receipt of this term sheet
$25,000 final balance payment due upon announcement date of July 15, 2015.
perturbation.changed_text:
Fee Due Dates
$75,000 - Sponsorship Fee
$50,000 due upon receipt of this term sheet
$25,000 final balance payment due upon announcement date of August 15, 2015.
perturbation.explanation: Changing the final balance payment due date from July 15, 2015 to August 15, 2015 introduces an in-text contradiction. This directly conflicts with section 1.(a)(xii) which states 'All finished art and deliverables must be sent from VNUE to ANTHEMIC by no later than July 15, 2015 to insure inclusion.' Now, it is unclear whether VNUE can deliver content by August 15 if that is now the final payment date.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (xii) One month ROS of FLOODMAGAZINE.COM. Campaign beginning August 2015. All finished art and deliverables must be sent from VNUE to ANTHEMIC by no later than July 15, 2015 to insure inclusion. Refer to media plan for specific dates.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the final balance payment due date to August 15, 2015. The contradicted text explicitly states that all finished art and deliverables must be sent by July 15, 2015. This creates a clear contradiction because the final payment is now due a month after the stated deadline for deliverables, creating uncertainty as to when VNUE will be able to deliver the promised content.

perturbation.original_text: ANTHEMIC and/ or FLOOD Magazine agree to introduce key VNUE personnel/ staff to key VIRGIN HOTEL CHICAGO personnel/ staff, upon receipt of final payment, on or before July 15, 2015.
perturbation.changed_text: ANTHEMIC and/ or FLOOD Magazine agree to introduce key VNUE personnel/ staff to key VIRGIN HOTEL CHICAGO personnel/ staff, upon receipt of initial payment, on or before July 15, 2015.
perturbation.explanation: Changing the requirement of introducing key personnel to 'upon receipt of final payment' to 'upon receipt of initial payment' creates an in-text contradiction. Section 2(a) outlines the payment schedule, with $50,000 due upon receipt of the term sheet and $25,000 due on July 15, 2015. This change makes it unclear WHEN and upon WHICH payment, the introductions are to occur.
perturbation.contradicted_text: To be a sponsor of the Event, the Sponsor will pay ANTHEMIC the following: Fee Due Dates $75,000 - Sponsorship Fee $50,000 due upon receipt of this term sheet $25,000 final balance payment due upon announcement date of July 15, 2015.
perturbation.justification: The changed text alters the condition for introducing key personnel from 'upon receipt of final payment' to 'upon receipt of initial payment'. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which outlines a payment schedule with both an initial and a final payment. This creates ambiguity and uncertainty regarding when the introduction of key personnel should occur, leading to an in-text contradiction as defined by 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' where 'different sections of a contract provide conflicting deadlines, obligations, or penalties.'

perturbation.original_text: Before April 1, 2016 ANTHEMIC will not discuss in any manner with any person or entity (other than the Sponsor) to be a sponsor of the Event in the Video App category. If ANTHEMIC produces the Event in 2016 and seeks a sponsor in the category, ANTHEMIC will first contact the Sponsor and provide the Sponsor with written notice (the "Notice) of the terms under which the Sponsor can be the category sponsor for the 2016 Event. The Sponsor will have 15 days from receipt of the Notice to accept the terms to be the category sponsor of the 2014 Event. If the Sponsor decides not to be the category sponsor of the 2016 Event or fails to timely respond to the Notice, then ANTHEMIC may approach other parties to be the category sponsor.
perturbation.changed_text: Before April 1, 2016 ANTHEMIC will not discuss in any manner with any person or entity (other than the Sponsor) to be a sponsor of the Event in the Video App category. If ANTHEMIC produces the Event in 2016 and seeks a sponsor in the category, ANTHEMIC will first contact the Sponsor and provide the Sponsor with written notice (the "Notice) of the terms under which the Sponsor can be the category sponsor for the 2016 Event. The Sponsor will have 5 days from receipt of the Notice to accept the terms to be the category sponsor of the 2016 Event. If the Sponsor decides not to be the category sponsor of the 2016 Event or fails to timely respond to the Notice, then ANTHEMIC may approach other parties to be the category sponsor.
perturbation.explanation: Changing the timeframe for the Sponsor's response to the Notice from '15 days' to '5 days' introduces an in-text contradiction with Section 13, which specifies notice periods. Now there are different time requirements when sending a Notice.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All notices and payment given in accordance with this Agreement will be effective if hand delivered or sent by overnight courier or by certified mail, return receipt requested to the following addresses: ANTHEMIC, LLC 5810 W. 3rd Street LA, CA 90036 Attn: Alan Sartirana VNUE INC 2003 Western Avenue, Suite 460 Seattle, Washington 98121 ATTN: Matthew Carona Addresses for notice may be changed from time to time by written notice to the other party. Any communication or payment given by mail will be effective upon the earlier of (a) five business days following deposit in a post office or other official depository under the care and custody of the United States Postal Service; or (b) actual receipt, as indicated by the return receipt. If notice or payment is given by personal delivery or by overnight air courier, the notice or payment will be effective when delivered to the appropriate address set forth above.
perturbation.justification: The change from '15 days' to '5 days' for the Sponsor's response time directly contradicts the 'Any communication or payment given by mail will be effective upon the earlier of (a) five business days following deposit in a post office' clause in the contradicted text. The contradicted text provides a general five-day timeframe for notice effectiveness via mail, creating an inconsistency in the notice periods, therefore a strong contradiction.
